stimulus_epochs.stimulus_name: Auditory go cue for foraging task

code.name: dynamic-foraging-task
code.version: behavior branch:main   commit ID:3ffdd641a2b8b1468a0addb67a74b1bf6600558f    version:1.6.55; metadata branch: main   commit ID:3ffdd641a2b8b1468a0addb67a74b1bf6600558f   version:1.6.55

stimulus_epochs.notes: The duration of go cue is 100 ms. The frequency is 7500 Hz. Amplitude is 60dB. The total reward consumed in the session is 470.0 microliters. The total reward including consumed in the session and supplementary water is 1.435 milliliters.

metrics.name: Raw data experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric displays raw data snippets for both for AP and LFP streams. Check out the snippets for abnormal noise or lack of spikes.Raw data can also be visualized in [Sortingview](https://figurl.org/f?v=npm://@fi-sci/figurl-sortingview@12/dist&d=kachery:aind:sha1:79b4660ed6db80f87202dcb97e3b2ee8f6aa43a3&label=ecephys_800779_2025-09-26_12-57-44%20-%20experiment1_Record%20Node%20101%23Neuropix-PXI-100.ProbeA_group0&zone=aind)

metrics.name: PSD experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric displays the power spectral density (PSD) of raw data. PDSs are computed by channel and shown as lines or map (by channel depth). Use the plots to spot contamination from high-frequency or line noise sources.

metrics.name: RMS experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric shows the noise levels (RMS) by depth for each channel, computed from the raw and preprocessed data. It also includes a summary of channel labels (after bad channel detection). Use this metric to check if out-of-brain channels are visible (lower RMS values at the top of the probe), but not labeled as 'out'.

metrics.name: Saturation events timeline experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric shows a scatter plot of saturation events, with red and blue markers for positive and negative events, respectively. Use this metric to spot an abnormal number of saturation events.

metrics.name: Trigger events experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric shows the average signals correpsinding to trigger events that could cause artifacts in the traces (e.g., opto stimulation, lick events). Use this metric to report abnormal artifacts that might affect spike sorting.

metrics.name: Probe Drift - experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric shows a rastermap of the recording with overlaid estimated motion. Use this metric to spot high drifts or bad drift estimation.

metrics.name: Unit Metrics Yield - experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric displays a summary of spike sorted units, including distributions of key features and number of units with different labels. Use this metric to report a low yield of units or a disproportionate high number of bad units with respect to good units. The sorting summary can also be viewed in [Sortingview](https://figurl.org/f?v=npm://@fi-sci/figurl-sortingview@12/dist&d=kachery:aind:sha1:89d502b192364c2135d14d90c3644288da418d13&s={%22sortingCuration%22:%22gh://AllenNeuralDynamics/ephys-sorting-manual-curation/main/ecephys_800779_2025-09-26_12-57-44/experiment1_Record Node 101%23Neuropix-PXI-100.ProbeA_group0/kilosort4/curation.json%22}&label=ecephys_800779_2025-09-26_12-57-44%20-%20experiment1_Record%20Node%20101%23Neuropix-PXI-100.ProbeA_group0%20-%20kilosort4%20-%20Sorting%20Summary&zone=aind)

metrics.name: Firing rate - experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric shows the population firing rate across the entire recording. Use this metric to spot abnormal seizure-like activity or firing rate gaps, which could result from hardware failures diring acquisition.

metrics.name: Sorting Curation - experiment1_ProbeA_group0
metrics.description: This metric renders the SpikeInterface GUI through the AIND ephys portal. You can use the GUI to curate spike sorting results (label, remove, merge, split). Use the 'Submit to parent' button to submit the curation data to the QC Portal.

metrics.description: This metric displays the power spectral density (PSD) of raw data. PDSs are computed by channel and shown as lines or map (by channel depth). Use the plots to spot contamination from high-frequency or line noise sources.

metrics.name: RMS experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric shows the noise levels (RMS) by depth for each channel, computed from the raw and preprocessed data. It also includes a summary of channel labels (after bad channel detection). Use this metric to check if out-of-brain channels are visible (lower RMS values at the top of the probe), but not labeled as 'out'.

metrics.name: Saturation events timeline experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric shows a scatter plot of saturation events, with red and blue markers for positive and negative events, respectively. Use this metric to spot an abnormal number of saturation events.

metrics.name: Trigger events experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric shows the average signals correpsinding to trigger events that could cause artifacts in the traces (e.g., opto stimulation, lick events). Use this metric to report abnormal artifacts that might affect spike sorting.

metrics.name: Probe Drift - experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric shows a rastermap of the recording with overlaid estimated motion. Use this metric to spot high drifts or bad drift estimation.

metrics.name: Unit Metrics Yield - experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric displays a summary of spike sorted units, including distributions of key features and number of units with different labels. Use this metric to report a low yield of units or a disproportionate high number of bad units with respect to good units. The sorting summary can also be viewed in [Sortingview](https://figurl.org/f?v=npm://@fi-sci/figurl-sortingview@12/dist&d=kachery:aind:sha1:37611e09a217e0cce48456d1fe3dc9bb15bda4cc&s={%22sortingCuration%22:%22gh://AllenNeuralDynamics/ephys-sorting-manual-curation/main/ecephys_800779_2025-09-26_12-57-44/experiment1_Record Node 101%23Neuropix-PXI-100.ProbeB_group1/kilosort4/curation.json%22}&label=ecephys_800779_2025-09-26_12-57-44%20-%20experiment1_Record%20Node%20101%23Neuropix-PXI-100.ProbeB_group1%20-%20kilosort4%20-%20Sorting%20Summary&zone=aind)

metrics.name: Firing rate - experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric shows the population firing rate across the entire recording. Use this metric to spot abnormal seizure-like activity or firing rate gaps, which could result from hardware failures diring acquisition.

metrics.name: Sorting Curation - experiment1_ProbeB_group1
metrics.description: This metric renders the SpikeInterface GUI through the AIND ephys portal. You can use the GUI to curate spike sorting results (label, remove, merge, split). Use the 'Submit to parent' button to submit the curation data to the QC Portal.

metrics.description: This metric displays raw data snippets for both for AP and LFP streams.
